ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the house involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_price" REAL /* Price at which the house was sold */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, rental) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent involved in the transaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "transaction_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments related to the transaction */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was closed (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "houses" (
  "house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each house */,
  "house_age" REAL /* Age of the house in years */,
  "distance_to_mrt" REAL /* Distance to the nearest MRT station in meters */,
  "num_convenience_stores" INTEGER /* Number of convenience stores within the vicinity */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the house */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the house */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Current market price per unit of the house */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment, townhouse) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year of the last renovation */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the agent */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency the agent works for */,
  "agent_license" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "agent_address" TEXT /* Address of the agent */,
  "agent_city" TEXT /* City where the agent is based */,
  "agent_state" TEXT /* State where the agent is based */,
  "agent_zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode where the agent is based */,
  "agent_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the agent */,
  "agent_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the agent's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "client_email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., individual, corporate) */,
  "client_address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "client_city" TEXT /* City where the client is based */,
  "client_state" TEXT /* State where the client is based */,
  "client_zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode where the client is based */,
  "client_phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client */,
  "client_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the client (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis entry */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the house being analyzed */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of similar houses in the area */,
  "price_trend" TEXT /* Trend of house prices (e.g., increasing, stable, decreasing) */,
  "market_demand" TEXT /* Demand level in the market (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the analysis is applicable */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., regression, time series) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity entry */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the house associated with the amenities */,
  "amenity_type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., school, hospital, park) */,
  "amenity_distance" REAL /* Distance to the amenity in meters */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "amenity_address" TEXT /* Address of the amenity */,
  "amenity_city" TEXT /* City where the amenity is located */,
  "amenity_state" TEXT /* State where the amenity is located */,
  "amenity_zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode where the amenity is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., unemployment rate) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "indicator_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was recorded */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the indicator is applicable */,
  "indicator_source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator (e.g., Bureau of Labor Statistics) */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_transactions" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction associated with the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_transactions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_transactions" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction associated with the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_transactions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, agent, client) */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_city" TEXT /* City where the user is based */,
  "user_state" TEXT /* State where the user is based */,
  "user_zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode where the user is based */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "user_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., transaction, market analysis) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction related to the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
